hero.title: The math coach that reads your handwriting
hero.subtitle: Upload a problem, solve it by hand, and get the right help: a hint, a check, or the full solution. Never the answer too soon.

how.title: How it works
how.lead: Three steps, in the student's own notebook.
how.s1Body: Snap a photo of the exercise or pick one from your library.
how.s2Body: Write your full solution with Apple Pencil. Multiple pages, your own process.
how.s3Body: Choose Hint, Check, or Reveal. If your handwriting is unclear, Ratatoskur asks before guessing.

why.title: Feedback while you solve, not after
why.p1: Most tools solve the problem for you. Ratatoskur stays with your process: it reads the problem and your handwritten work, then responds at the level you ask for.
why.p2: Hints nudge without spoiling. Checks catch a wrong turn early. Reveal is there when you want the full path. The student keeps ownership of the solving.
why.p3: And it works in Icelandic, where good math-tutoring tools are scarce.

hood.title: Under the hood
hood.lead: Built for real classrooms, with privacy in mind.
hood.i1Body: The model sees both the exercise image and the student's multi-page solution.
hood.i2Body: Hint, Check, and Reveal are distinct behaviors, not one prompt with different labels.
hood.i3Body: Students choose what may be used for analytics and dataset work at registration.
hood.i4Body: Attempts, common errors, and feedback usefulness are tracked for teachers and researchers.

contact.title: Bring Ratatoskur to your school
contact.lead: We are running early pilots with schools and teachers. If that is you, get in touch.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thanks. We will be in touch.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly.
